data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement of auto-refresh functionality but lacks concrete evidence to support its implementation. The linked use case specifies the need for real-time status updates and auto-refresh, yet no evidence was provided to demonstrate that this functionality is operational or tested. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not confirm that the auto-refresh feature is present or functioning as expected.
gaps: No evidence of the auto-refresh functionality being implemented or tested.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
